ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_codes" (
  "travel_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel booking */,
  "user_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who booked the travel */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency handling the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., booked, canceled, confirmed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the booking was made */,
  "refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the booking is refundable */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_codes_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_codes_user_code FOREIGN KEY ("user_code") REFERENCES users ("user_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_codes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the user */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty reward points */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating of the agency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agency (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "travel_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel code of the booking */,
  "from_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport */,
  "to_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., first class, economy) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "time" REAL /* Duration of the flight */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the flight */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for the flight */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal for the flight */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Aircraft model */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_travel_code FOREIGN KEY ("travel_code") REFERENCES travel_codes ("travel_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "user_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who booked the flight */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Return date of the flight (if applicable) */,
  "check_in_status" TEXT /* Check-in status of the flight */,
  "boarding_status" TEXT /* Boarding status of the flight */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim information */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_history_user_code FOREIGN KEY ("user_code") REFERENCES users ("user_code")
)
